title: It's Like This Every Day for Her

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's days don't end with training sessions.
She also works a variety of part-time jobs to earn
the money to fund her sisters' dance classes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training, classes, and part-time work—she gives
each of them her all. Ines Fujin spares no effort as
she prepares for her debut race, the first step
toward her dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin's coworkers, inspired by her incredible
work ethic, lend their encouragement. She's
charming people left, right, and center—myself
included.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we have less time to train, then I'll just have to
make it up with pure support! As her trainer, I'll
do whatever I can!
